title: Auto Invisible
description: AutoInvisible allows you to automatically drink an invisibility potion, ensuring safety, for example, when AFK at your base, staying at farms, or while loading terrain.
body:
**Recently, I released a mod that simplifies movement in the game.**
**Details:** https://modrinth.com/mod/better-movement-(fabric)


AutoInvisibleMod is a client-side mod that automatically maintains the invisibility effect by drinking potions if they are in your hotbar. Useful for AFK farming or chunk loading, without the risk of being griefed.


# **Key Features**

**Automatic Potion Drinking**: The mod tracks the invisibility effect and drinks a new potion shortly before it expires, ensuring continuous invisibility.

**Slot Restoration**: Returns to the previously selected hotbar slot after drinking a potion.



  Currently, the functionality is limited, but new "useful" updates will be released soon.
